		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_inuit_pagan_religion }

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = zemiist_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_zemiist_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = zemiist }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_zemiist_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = kachina_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_kachina_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = kachina }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_kachina_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = pohakantenna_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_pohakantenna_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = pohakantenna }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_pohakantenna_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = sgaanaang_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_sgaanaang_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = sgaanaang }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_sgaanaang_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = wakanda_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_wakanda_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = wakanda }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_wakanda_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = wakan_tanka_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_wakan_tanka_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = wakan_tanka }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_wakan_tanka_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = mahoma_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_mahoma_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = mahoma }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_mahoma_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = southern_cult_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_southern_cult_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = southern_cult }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_southern_cult_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = orenda_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_orenda_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = orenda }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_orenda_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = algic_pagan_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_algic_pagan_reformed_religion }

	else_if = {

	else_if = {

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = tehuelchian }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_tehuelchian_religion }

	else_if = {

		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_witran_mapu_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = witran_mapu }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_witran_mapu_religion }

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = tsarutama_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_tsarutama_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = tsarutama }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_tsarutama_religion }

		limit = { religion = kaaulayawaa_reformed }

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = kaaulayawaa }

	else_if = {

		limit = { religion = south_american }

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = dreamtime_religion_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_dreamtime_religion_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = dreamtime_religion }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_dreamtime_religion_religion }

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = maori_religion_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_maori_religion_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = maori_religion }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_maori_religion_religion }

	else_if = {

	}
	else_if = {

	else_if = {

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = jurchen_pagan }

		limit = { religion = shingyo }

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = nihon_shinto }

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = ryukyu_shinto }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_ryukyu_shinto_religion }
	}
